x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Active Studio application projects indicate platform investment in custom development. A healthy volume of projects signals that Now Assist for Creator will have meaningful impact accelerating developer productivity across the portfolio.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure developers are using App Engine Studio for application development.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_d603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c90
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE">
<ai_justification><![CDATA[Active Studio application projects indicate platform investment in custom development. A healthy volume of projects signals that Now Assist for Creator will have meaningful impact accelerating developer productivity across the portfolio.]]></ai_justification>
<check_name>Studio Application Projects Volume</check_name>
<check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("sn_app_eng_studio_project");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=5)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" projects",finding:c+" AES projects found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" projects",finding:c+" AES project(s) found."};
return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:"0 projects",finding:"No App Engine Studio projects found."};
})()]]></check_script>
<is_active>true</is_active>
<is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive>
<is_manual>false</is_manual>
<module>CREATOR</module>
<number>CHK0006188</number>
<order/>
<remediation_guidance>Ensure developers are using App Engine Studio for application development.</remediation_guidance>
<sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
<sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_created_on>
<sys_id>d603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c90</sys_id>
<sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
<sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
<sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:06:00</sys_updated_on>
</x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
